description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a large, floor-to-ceiling wall unit paired with a matching island counter. The wall unit is constructed from light wood panels with a natural grain, interspersed with white cabinet doors and a single black panel, likely representing an appliance or accent. The cabinetry includes a variety of open and closed storage spaces, with both upper and lower compartments, and a central cutout area that could accommodate a sink or cooktop. The island counter is topped with a white, marble-like surface and includes a rectangular cutout, possibly for a sink or prep area, with additional storage below. The overall design is modern and minimalist, with clean lines and a seamless appearance, lacking visible handles or hardware. This cabinetry set would be suitable for a contemporary kitchen or communal urban space, offering both functional storage and workspace.
description: A modern, light wood and white cabinetry set with a tall wall unit and a matching island counter, featuring open and closed storage and a marble-like countertop. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the marble-like island counter with a cutout and the full height of the wall unit, highlighting the arrangement of storage compartments and the black accent panel.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth and thickness of both the wall unit and island, with minimal detail visible on the cabinetry faces.
description_view_2: Frontal view of the wall unit displaying the full array of open and closed compartments, white doors, and the black accent, with the island counter in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the wall unit and the island, with the marble-like surface and cutout visible.
attribute_cabinet_type: tall pantry cabinet with island base cabinet
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double doors, single doors, open shelves, and appliance panel
